name: Pure
long_description: Pure characters still inhabit the body they were born with. They have not undergone Apotheosis, though they may still have any number of Augmentations, both bioware and cyberware. [5]

additional_aspects.description: Describes some physical trait related to your body.

notes: Loses all State Benefits (including the Skill bonus) if Apotheosis Augmentation is taken later. [5]

name: SIM
short_description: A substrate-independent mind residing as pure software in a host computer.
long_description: The substrate-independent mind (SIM) has undergone Apotheosis, but has elected to reside in a host computer system purely as software instead of downloading into a sleeve. [5]

skill_ranks_physical_allocation.notes: These skills allow interaction with virtual objects. [5]

drawbacks.description: Can only view the world from one mesh at a time, taking about five minutes to transition. Can shift perspective within the same mesh at a pace equivalent to a running human. [5]

May suffer penalties due to lag on Skill tests when acting through machines located a great distance from the host. Within 1000 km: no penalty. Same star system: -2 penalty. Outside star system: -4 penalty. [6]
Must appear as a semi-transparent ARO when ghosting in the physical world due to Humanity Preservation Act. [6]

notes: Spends most time in a custom home virtual environment; SIMs have dominion over their home environment. [6]

name: Sleeved
short_description: Has undergone Apotheosis and inhabits a sleeve.
long_description: You have undergone Apotheosis, and inhabit a sleeve. It may be the body you were born with, transformed via Apotheosis, or one you’ve purchased. [5]
notes: Physical Skills are determined by the chosen sleeve. [3]
